notes: Strongest moment: the turn-3 counterfactual ('if you'd only resized the connection pool... do the outages still happen?') cleanly extracted the concession that reframed the whole thesis, and the examiner honored the turn-4 stop instantly with no further questions, delivering a well-calibrated aporia verdict on partial information rather than papering it over. Weakest moment: the turn-4 question folds in 'maybe optimizing the hot path,' a mild alternative the user hadn't raised (the pool fix was the user's own), which flirts with — but stays on the questioning side of — the no-solutioning line; type diversity was also modest given only ~4 questions before the stop.
